tyreek hill.flag: released; multi-ligament knee, 2026 availability uncertain, may retire

tank dell.flag: multiple knee surgeries; progressing at OTAs, early-season return uncertain

zach charbonnet.flag: ACL (Feb surgery); likely misses early/much of season, Week 1 a long shot

george kittle.flag: Achilles; ahead of schedule but may open on PUP, miss ~first month

puka nacua.flag: in rehab; off-field/discipline risk, no current suspension — monitor

patrick mahomes.flag: ACL+LCL recovery; eyeing Week 1, ahead of schedule, monitor early weeks

malik nabers.flag: ACL; GM expects Week 1, monitor camp ramp

cam skattebo.flag: lower-leg injury; expected to be eased in slowly early

alec pierce.flag: ankle procedure; expected to miss start of camp

chris olave.flag: blood clot; off blood thinners 6/29, on track for Week 1

rashee rice.flag: knee cleanup surgery; no suspension, expected on time to camp

sam laporta.flag: back/herniated disc; expects full clearance by camp

jadarian price.flag: ↑ lead back; Walker gone, Charbonnet (ACL) out

justin fields.flag: ↑ could start early if Mahomes (knee) limited; rushing-QB upside

davante adams.flag: ↑ target/red-zone bump if Nacua misses time
